subject: Science
topic_summary: Students learn that plants make food in their leaves and that roots, stems, and leaves perform different jobs to help the plant live and grow.
lesson_goal: Help students identify the basic functions of roots, stems, and leaves and connect plant parts to everyday observation.
source_title: NCERT EVS Grade 5 - Plants Around Us
content: Plants make food in their leaves using sunlight, air, and water. Different parts of a plant perform different jobs. Roots hold the plant and absorb water. Stems support the plant. Leaves help prepare food.
keywords: plants, leaves, roots, stems, sunlight, plant parts

subject: Science
topic_summary: Students explore what plants need in order to grow well, including air, water, sunlight, and space.
lesson_goal: Help students connect plant growth to basic needs and encourage simple observation-based classroom activities.
content: Plants need air, water, sunlight, and space to grow well. Children can observe how a plant changes over time by watering it regularly and placing it where it gets light.
keywords: plants, growth, water, sunlight, air, space
